name_en: Original Stock Burberry Mini Two-Tone Canvas & Leather Freya Tote, made with topstitched leather and cotton canvas, decorated with the Horseferry print. Can be carried by the top handle or with the adjustable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 23 x 8 x 19cm
